3922.Dialogue: Don't blink, this is the cold light slashing towards you!

3949.Dialogue: Technique is born from practice, but true artistry is born from responsibility.

3951.Dialogue: I'm truly happy that I can be of help to everyone! Please, don't stand on ceremony.

3950.Dialogue: The truth of the world is meant to be this orderly, with no room for the slightest chaos.

3948.Dialogue: Do you feel it? The presence of the ancestors. They have never forsaken the Kanamia Tribe.

3946.Dialogue: Are you ready? Full army attack!

3908.Dialogue: The sound of prayer is saying: Don't give up!

3902.Dialogue: Darkness, to be illuminated by thunder!

3903.Dialogue: Come, feel the heat of my battle axe!

3923.Dialogue: Smash! Smash! Smash! Destruction is art!

3926.Dialogue: Come here, where else do you want to go?!

3938.Dialogue: Cocooned? Oh no, this is just a temporary hibernation...

3957.Dialogue: The very earth trembles beneath my feet, intruder!

3952.Dialogue: Maintain vigilance. Any lapse in concentration is fatal.

3953.Dialogue: Straighten up, you maggots! Your boss is here!

3955.Dialogue: Target acquired! Crushing blow!... (Misses) *Cough, cough* Ahem! Merely a strategic feint to test your resolve!

3956.Dialogue: I am the fury of the earth, and the last ember of the forest!

3904.Dialogue: Come on, feel the tremor of battle!

3905.Dialogue: Roar, are you ready for the savage charge!

3915.Dialogue: Clap clap clap, a rain of swords, hahaha...

3917.Dialogue: This slash, cuts more than just the retreat...

3927.Dialogue: Roar... no one can stop me!

3928.Dialogue: Haven't you heard? No matter how skilled in martial arts, one still fears a kitchen knife!

3930.Dialogue: Stand behind me, I will block everything!

3934.Dialogue: Hey, I'm here... no no no, I'm actually here...

3940.Dialogue: Let it go with the wind...

3941.Dialogue: I am a little bee, flying among the flowers... Hehe!

3959.Dialogue: A chaotic magic source has been detected. In accordance with Legion law, I shall neutralize it.

3960.Dialogue: At last, a moving target! Come, have a taste of my blade!

3962.Dialogue: Hiss-kaka! New test subject! Let me give you a little prick.

3961.Dialogue: You've just stepped into my "friendly" little welcoming trap!

3964.Dialogue: This blade of mine bears the weight of a thousand leaves... Yikes!

3965.Dialogue: Heed the law of this magic! —Achoo!

3966.Dialogue: The forest will remember your passage, whether in kindness or in malice.
